primary_evidence.title: Crypto Pricing with Hidden Factors
primary_evidence.relevance: Latent crypto and equity-industry factor exposure, plus external sentiment, rotation and security-shock state variables.

primary_evidence.title: Cryptocurrency as an Investable Asset Class: Coming of Age
primary_evidence.relevance: Broad asset-pricing evidence that jumps and blockchain information are economically important.

primary_evidence.title: Explainable Patterns in Cryptocurrency Microstructure
primary_evidence.relevance: Stable short-horizon predictive structure from one-second limit-order-book and trade features.

primary_evidence.title: Empirical Crypto Asset Pricing
primary_evidence.relevance: Large characteristic screen in which statistically significant long-short evidence was concentrated in functions of past returns.

primary_evidence.title: Fundamentals of Perpetual Futures
primary_evidence.relevance: Perpetual-versus-spot theoretical pricing bounds and convergence mechanism.

primary_evidence.title: An Information Theory Approach to the Stock and Cryptocurrency Market
primary_evidence.relevance: Cross-sectional return-distribution and informational-efficiency description, not an identified directional trading premium.

idea_screens.name: latent_crypto_factor_exposure_premium
idea_screens.proposed_mechanism: contracts with different exposure to hidden common crypto factors may earn different risk premia
idea_screens.payer_and_direction: not uniquely identified before outcomes; an unsupervised factor sign is arbitrary and does not identify who pays
idea_screens.local_data: computable from returns only, but requires model-order, factor-number and rotation choices

idea_screens.name: equity_technology_integration_beta
idea_screens.proposed_mechanism: crypto contracts exposed to technology and profitability equity factors may command a premium
idea_screens.payer_and_direction: risk-compensation sign is not fixed for the local perpetual universe
idea_screens.local_data: requires point-in-time external equity-industry factor history, which is outside the frozen local-OKX boundary

idea_screens.name: sentiment_rotation_and_security_shock_state
idea_screens.proposed_mechanism: fear-greed, altcoin rotation and hacked-value shocks may change expected crypto returns
idea_screens.payer_and_direction: state variables have competing risk-off, rebound and continuation interpretations
idea_screens.local_data: requires external sentiment indexes, rotation indexes and event databases; none are present point in time locally

idea_screens.name: blockchain_fundamental_activity_premium
idea_screens.proposed_mechanism: network usage and blockchain fundamentals may lead token valuation and returns
idea_screens.payer_and_direction: plausible, but each field requires separate economic sign and token-specific normalization
idea_screens.local_data: no point-in-time chain activity, fees, addresses, supply or protocol-revenue history exists in the approved local dataset

idea_screens.name: portable_limit_order_book_microstructure
idea_screens.proposed_mechanism: queue imbalance, spread, depth and adverse-selection features predict very short-horizon returns
idea_screens.payer_and_direction: liquidity takers and informed flow provide a clear microstructure payer
idea_screens.local_data: requires continuous one-second L2 and trade history; the cited evidence uses Binance Futures and a CatBoost pipeline

idea_screens.name: expanded_ohlcv_return_characteristic_screen
idea_screens.proposed_mechanism: screen additional lagged-return transformations for cross-sectional predictability
idea_screens.payer_and_direction: speculative underreaction or overreaction, but direction depends on the chosen return transformation

idea_screens.name: perpetual_theoretical_price_bound_convergence
idea_screens.proposed_mechanism: perpetual prices outside friction-adjusted spot and funding bounds should converge
idea_screens.local_data: spot, perpetual and funding observations exist, but this mechanism has already been studied and closed under the project rules

idea_screens.name: cross_sectional_return_entropy_state
idea_screens.proposed_mechanism: changes in the cross-sectional return distribution may indicate information efficiency or stress
idea_screens.payer_and_direction: the descriptive state does not uniquely imply continuation or convergence before outcomes

allowed_next_work: continue H22, V357 and H27 frozen forward evidence updates
continue primary-evidence search for a genuinely new causal field available point in time on OKX with sufficient multi-year history
run structured-family, historical-alias and failure-fingerprint gates before implementation
keep PnL sealed until a candidate passes payer, direction, data, independence, cost-scale and freedom gates
